original_description: Use this skill whenever the user wants to take an existing ticket / issue, run the Sandstorm spec quality gate on it, and then (once it passes) create a stack with the ticket's verbatim body as the initial task. Trigger phrases include: 'take ticket N and build it', 'spec and dispatch N', 'fire up a stack for ticket N', 'let's work on #N', 'start issue N in a stack', 'create a stack for issue N, run the gate first'. This skill is the full start-to-dispatch flow for a ticket: fetch ticket → spec_check → (refine loop if needed) → create_stack with gateApproved=true and the ticket body as the initial task. Do NOT trigger for: dispatching follow-up work to an EXISTING stack (that's the sandstorm / check-and-resume flow), running the spec gate in isolation (that's the sandstorm-spec skill), or creating a stack without a ticket.

train_results.query: Start with an idea: I want to let users pin notes to the top. Make a ticket, make it pass our quality gates, then if everything's good, fire up a stack and get it done.
Take a look at ticket 149. Basically I want this. Let's flesh out the details. Once it passes our quality checks, let's fire up a stack. Start a stack and make it happen.
Take a look at ticket 144. Looks ready to go. Take a look and see how it looks to you. If it passes all our checks, let's go ahead and work on that.
Take a look at ticket 250. It looks like this is all spec'd out. If that looks good to you, let's go ahead and kick off a stack with it. If not, let's figure out what else we need.
Can you take a look at ticket 43? Let me know if it passes our quality gates or not. If not, let's flesh out the details.
Take a look at ticket 275. I want you to help me spec this ticket out a little bit further. We want to make sure it passes our quality checks.
Stack 23 was halted because of token limits. Can you pick up where it left off?
Let me know what the status is of all the stacks.
Stack 123 looks like it's ready for a pull request. Go ahead and make a pull request.
Let's go ahead and tear down stack 420.
